title: J6's Modernized Creepers
description: Gives Creepers a modern style based on its appearances in Dungeons, Legends, & A Minecraft Movie; While staying true to the original design.
body:
Does the current Creeper texture feel a bit outdated for you? If so why not try this resource pack!

![The banner for modernized creepers, featuring a single retextured creeper in the middle of the forest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bd301a00b68f55af37a84d7672348cc9bfc7c92.png)

In this pack, Creepers are retextured to have a more mossy look, similar to their apperances in Dungeons, Legends, and A Minecraft Movie. This pack only changes the Creeper's texture and if using the 1.21.5 version the Creeper Spawn Egg too.

- Please do not distribute or modify any of these textures unless it is for personal use!
